ranking_variants.conservative_rank: current_score plus small boosts for expanding volume and accepted strong families
ranking_variants.strong_v1_rank: current_score plus S-A, B3 red MACD re-acceleration, and B3 rebound risk adjustments
ranking_variants.strong_v2_rank: diagnostic candidate: strong_v1_rank minus repeated negative-group risk flags; keep offline until it beats v1
ranking_variants.strong_v3_rank: diagnostic candidate: strong_v2 plus penalty for strong B2 near-high expanding red-turnover losers
ranking_variants.s_a_priority: diagnostic stress test: prioritize S-A family before current_score
ranking_variants.family_rank: diagnostic stress test: rank by historical family strength and indicator hits

diagnosis: strong_v1 improves high-ret3 capture over current_score, while strong_v2 is only a risk-flag experiment. Do not promote strong_v2 unless regenerated diagnostics show it beats strong_v1 on top3/top5 positive and negative metrics.
next_step: Keep strong_v1 as the current strong sorting candidate, then repeat the same route-specific report for neutral and weak with separate factor definitions.
